text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: The survey response sheets, the information magazines… I believe these are all the materials.

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text: Yes. With this amount… We'll have to make a few trips. Leave carrying these boxes to me――

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow, you all have a ton of stuff to carry! Please, let me help you.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: A gourmet fair… Are you preparing for it?

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's a collaboration with the racecourse, a campaign to sell Horsegirls' highly recommended gourmet foods. We're the executive committee representing the academy.

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text: We were just about to check the survey results and compile the information. First up… We need to pick out the most popular gourmet spots.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I see… So the fans will get to taste our favorite foods too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: We'll get to share our feelings of happiness through food… Hehe, what a heartwarming project.

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: We've gathered so many survey responses that are a joy just to read. We have a responsibility to compile them properly.

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: And then… We have to gather information on each store… And figure out the criteria for narrowing down the candidate stores…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Whoa…! Still, you were here too…!

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: Hehe… I've been here the whole time. I'm… On the executive committee, too…

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: In any case, we should start by tallying up the results and deciding on the slots for the collaboration stores.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Still, there's quite a variety. Rice dishes, noodles, grilled foods, sweets… I wonder how we should narrow it down.

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: In these cases, we ought to establish some guidelines first… Now then, what should those guidelines be?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ――Ah, in that case, what about "taste"? Our very own taste buds!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If we go to the most voted stores one by one and actually eat there, I think it'd be easier to get an idea for the fair.

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: ――! …You're right. It wouldn't do for us to recommend food to the fans that we haven't even tasted ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As executive committee members, we must 
approach all these foods with sincerity… Shall we start making our rounds?
One afternoon, I stopped by a ramen shop for a late lunch. It's popular at the academy and is even the talk among the trainers, but――

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: Hmm… So this is the number one most popular dish, the Super-Sized Extra-Carrot Ramen. It's quite a hefty portion.

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text: Yes. Rather than a light snack to eat while watching a race, this is the type of gourmet food you sit down and take your time with outside of race hours.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It sure is crowded, as expected of a popular store. There are so many people and Horsegirls here――

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ――Ah, Trainer from the academy! Could it be that this place is popular among the trainers, too?
I was surprised to be called out to so suddenly, but… It's true that word of mouth at the academy has spread to the trainers as well. When I told them as much――

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I see! With this kind of reception, it seems like it'd be popular with the customers at the racecourse too. Maybe this shop is already a sure thing?

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: Yes. We're currently reviewing potential collaboration candidates for the gourmet fair project.
choice_data_list: <size=30>You're all on the executive committee? That's impressive</size>
<size=30>You're all on the executive committee? That's impressive</size>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah, no, no! I'm not on the executive committee. These three are the members.

text_block_list.name: Durandal
text_block_list.text: Buena was only supposed to help us carry materials… But thanks to her kindness, she ended up accompanying us all the way here.

text_block_list.name: Still in Love
text_block_list.text: She's already investigated multiple stores with us… And she's provided so many useful opinions…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Oh, stop it! I just got so moved by the idea of the gourmet fair. I wanted to help out somehow～ And before I knew it, here I am.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Besides, thinking about how we can make things enjoyable for all the fans～ It made it fun for me too, I guess.
choice_data_list: <size=38>…Why not just join the executive committee?</size>

text_block_list.name: Cesario
text_block_list.text: True… In fact, your mindset is completely that of an executive committee member already. If it's alright with you, Buena, we'd love to have you.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Really? I'd love to…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Then, as a member of the executive committee… I'm looking forward to working with you all!
